scopeNote: Recovery-review-comments scrutiny was completed manually after every `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launch failed with an external custom-model configuration error. The required milestone validators still passed on the current branch, all twelve completed implementation features were reviewed from their propagated reachable diffs/commits, and each review artifact now records a branch-reachable commit id rather than a stale lower-branch anchor.

lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

rejectedObservations.observation: The `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task droid failed to launch for every feature with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-medium`, so all feature reviews were completed manually from propagated commit diffs and mission artifacts instead.
